---
title: "Web App"
author: "Sean McGarry"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(shiny)
library(dplyr)
```
# ui
```{r}
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("NFL Blowout Spread Predictor"),
  
  fluidRow(
    column(12,
      div(style = "display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px;",
        p(style = "color: gray; margin: 0;", textOutput("game_label", inline = TRUE)),
        div(
          span("Score: ", style = "color: gray;"),
          strong(textOutput("score_display", inline = TRUE))
        )
      )
    )
  ),
  
  fluidRow(
    column(5,
      uiOutput("away_card")
    ),
    column(2,
      div(style = "text-align: center; padding-top: 50px;",
        h4("vs", style = "color: gray;")
      )
    ),
    column(5,
      uiOutput("home_card")
    )
  ),
  
  br(),
  
  fluidRow(
    column(12,
      uiOutput("spread_bar")
    )
  ),
  
  br(),
  
  fluidRow(
    column(12,
      uiOutput("pick_buttons")
    )
  ),
  
  br(),
  
  fluidRow(
    column(12,
      uiOutput("result_ui")
    )
  ),
  
  hr(),
  
  fluidRow(
    column(4, actionButton("btn_prev", "← Prev", class = "btn btn-outline-secondary")),
    column(4, p(textOutput("prog_text"), style = "text-align: center; color: gray; padding-top: 6px;")),
    column(4, div(style = "text-align: right;", actionButton("btn_next", "Next →", class = "btn btn-outline-secondary")))
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  rv <- reactiveValues(
    games = NULL,
    idx = 1,
    picks = list(),
    correct = 0,
    total = 0
  )
  
  # Load on startup
  observe({
  blowout_games <- nfl_games_clean2 %>%
    filter(
      home_blowout_win_prev == 1 | home_blowout_loss_prev == 1 |
      away_blowout_win_prev == 1 | away_blowout_loss_prev == 1
    ) %>%
    slice_sample(prop = 1)
  rv$games <- blowout_games
    }) %>% bindEvent(TRUE)
  
  nfl_logos <- c(
  ARI = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/ari.png",
  ATL = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/atl.png",
  BAL = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/bal.png",
  BUF = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/buf.png",
  CAR = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/car.png",
  CHI = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/chi.png",
  CIN = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/cin.png",
  CLE = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/cle.png",
  DAL = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/dal.png",
  DEN = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/den.png",
  DET = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/det.png",
  GB  = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/gb.png",
  HOU = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/hou.png",
  IND = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/ind.png",
  JAX = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/jax.png",
  KC  = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/kc.png",
  LA  = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/lar.png",
  LAC = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/lac.png",
  SD =  "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/lac.png",
  LAR = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/lar.png",
  LV  = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/lv.png",
  MIA = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/mia.png",
  MIN = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/min.png",
  NE  = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/ne.png",
  NO  = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/no.png",
  NYG = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/nyg.png",
  NYJ = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/nyj.png",
  PHI = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/phi.png",
  PIT = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/pit.png",
  SEA = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/sea.png",
  SF  = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/sf.png",
  TB  = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/tb.png",
  TEN = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/ten.png",
  WAS = "https://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/nfl/500/wsh.png"
)
  
  get_tag <- function(blowout_win, blowout_loss, prev_margin) {
    if (!is.na(blowout_win) && blowout_win == 1) return(list(label = "Blowout Win", color = "#28a745", bg = "#f0fff4"))
    if (!is.na(blowout_loss) && blowout_loss == 1) return(list(label = "Blowout Loss", color = "#dc3545", bg = "#fff5f5"))
    if (!is.na(prev_margin) && prev_margin > 0) return(list(label = "Win", color = "#17a2b8", bg = "#f0faff"))
    if (!is.na(prev_margin) && prev_margin < 0) return(list(label = "Loss", color = "#fd7e14", bg = "#fff8f0"))
    return(list(label = "No Data", color = "#6c757d", bg = "#f8f9fa"))
  }
  
  fmt_margin <- function(m) {
    if (is.na(m)) return("—")
    if (m > 0) paste0("+", m) else as.character(m)
  }
  
  fmt_odds <- function(o) {
    if (is.na(o) || is.null(o)) return("—")
    if (o > 0) paste0("+", o) else as.character(o)
  }
  
 make_team_card <- function(abbr, side_label, blowout_win, blowout_loss, prev_margin,
                            spread_odds, border_color = "#dee2e6") {
  tag <- get_tag(blowout_win, blowout_loss, prev_margin)
  logo_url <- nfl_logos[abbr]
  
  div(style = paste0("border: 2px solid ", border_color, "; border-radius: 10px; padding: 20px; height: 100%;"),
    
    # --- only this block changes ---
    div(style = "display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px;",
      if (!is.na(logo_url)) {
        tags$img(src = logo_url, style = "width: 52px; height: 52px; object-fit: contain;")
      },
      div(
        h3(abbr, style = "margin: 0;"),
        p(side_label, style = "color: gray; font-size: 13px; margin: 0;")
      )
    ),
    # --- everything below stays exactly the same ---
    
    div(style = paste0("display: inline-block; background: ", tag$bg, "; color: ", tag$color,
                       "; border: 1px solid ", tag$color, "; border-radius: 4px;",
                       "font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; padding: 3px 10px; margin-bottom: 14px;"),
      tag$label
    ),
    
    hr(style = "margin: 10px 0;"),
    
    div(style = "font-size: 13px;",
      div(style = "display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 6px;",
        span("Prev week margin", style = "color: gray;"),
        strong(fmt_margin(prev_margin))
      ),
      div(style = "display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 6px;",
        span("Spread odds", style = "color: gray;"),
        strong(fmt_odds(spread_odds))
      )
    )
  )
}
  
  current_game <- reactive({
    req(rv$games)
    rv$games[rv$idx, ]
  })
  
  output$game_label <- renderText({
    req(rv$games)
    paste0("Game ", rv$idx, " of ", nrow(rv$games))
  })
  
  output$prog_text <- renderText({
    req(rv$games)
    paste0(rv$idx, " / ", nrow(rv$games))
  })
  
  output$score_display <- renderText({
    paste0(rv$correct, " / ", rv$total)
  })
  
  output$away_card <- renderUI({
    g <- current_game()
    pick_made <- !is.null(rv$picks[[as.character(rv$idx)]])
    border <- "#dee2e6"
    if (pick_made) {
      correct_side <- if (!is.na(g$home_cover) && g$home_cover == 1) "home" else "away"
      if (correct_side == "away") border <- "#28a745"
      if (rv$picks[[as.character(rv$idx)]] == "away" && correct_side != "away") border <- "#dc3545"
    }
    make_team_card(g$away_team, "Away", g$away_blowout_win_prev, g$away_blowout_loss_prev,
                   g$prev_away_margin, g$away_spread_odds, border)
  })
  
  output$home_card <- renderUI({
    g <- current_game()
    pick_made <- !is.null(rv$picks[[as.character(rv$idx)]])
    border <- "#dee2e6"
    if (pick_made) {
      correct_side <- if (!is.na(g$home_cover) && g$home_cover == 1) "home" else "away"
      if (correct_side == "home") border <- "#28a745"
      if (rv$picks[[as.character(rv$idx)]] == "home" && correct_side != "home") border <- "#dc3545"
    }
    make_team_card(g$home_team, "Home", g$home_blowout_win_prev, g$home_blowout_loss_prev,
                   g$prev_home_margin, g$home_spread_odds, border)
  })
  
  output$spread_bar <- renderUI({
  g <- current_game()
  sl <- g$spread_line
  favor_team <- if (sl > 0) g$home_team else if (sl < 0) g$away_team else "Pick 'em"
  favor_amt <- if (sl == 0) "" else paste0(" -", abs(sl))
  spread_str <- paste0(favor_team, favor_amt)

  div(
    p(format(as.Date(g$gameday), "%B %d, %Y"), style = "color: gray; font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 8px;"),
    div(style = "background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 20px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;",
      span("Spread:", style = "color: gray; font-size: 14px;"),
      strong(spread_str, style = "font-size: 18px;"),
      span("favored", style = "color: white; font-size: 14px;")
    )
  )
})

  
  output$pick_buttons <- renderUI({
    g <- current_game()
    pick_made <- !is.null(rv$picks[[as.character(rv$idx)]])
    
    if (!pick_made) {
      div(
        p("Who covers the spread?", style = "color: gray; font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 10px;"),
        fluidRow(
          column(6, actionButton("pick_away", paste(g$away_team, "covers"),
                                 class = "btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg btn-block", style = "width: 100%;")),
          column(6, actionButton("pick_home", paste(g$home_team, "covers"),
                                 class = "btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg btn-block", style = "width: 100%;"))
        )
      )
    }
  })
  
  output$result_ui <- renderUI({
    g <- current_game()
    pick_made <- !is.null(rv$picks[[as.character(rv$idx)]])
    if (!pick_made) return(NULL)
    
    current_pick <- rv$picks[[as.character(rv$idx)]]
    correct_side <- if (!is.na(g$home_cover) && g$home_cover == 1) "home" else "away"
    cover_team <- if (correct_side == "home") g$home_team else g$away_team
    is_correct <- current_pick == correct_side
    
    score_str <- if (!is.na(g$away_score) && !is.na(g$home_score)) {
      paste0("Final: ", g$away_team, " ", g$away_score, " — ", g$home_team, " ", g$home_score, ". ")
    } else ""
    
    div(style = paste0("padding: 14px 18px; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid ",
                       if (is_correct) "#28a745" else "#dc3545", ";",
                       "background: ", if (is_correct) "#f0fff4" else "#fff5f5"),
      strong(if (is_correct) "Correct! " else "Incorrect. "),
      span(paste0(score_str, cover_team, " covered the spread."))
    )
  })
  
  observeEvent(input$pick_away, {
    key <- as.character(rv$idx)
    if (is.null(rv$picks[[key]])) {
      rv$picks[[key]] <- "away"
      rv$total <- rv$total + 1
      g <- current_game()
      correct_side <- if (!is.na(g$home_cover) && g$home_cover == 1) "home" else "away"
      if (correct_side == "away") rv$correct <- rv$correct + 1
    }
  })
  
  observeEvent(input$pick_home, {
    key <- as.character(rv$idx)
    if (is.null(rv$picks[[key]])) {
      rv$picks[[key]] <- "home"
      rv$total <- rv$total + 1
      g <- current_game()
      correct_side <- if (!is.na(g$home_cover) && g$home_cover == 1) "home" else "away"
      if (correct_side == "home") rv$correct <- rv$correct + 1
    }
  })
  
  observeEvent(input$btn_prev, {
    if (rv$idx > 1) rv$idx <- rv$idx - 1
  })
  
  observeEvent(input$btn_next, {
    req(rv$games)
    if (rv$idx < nrow(rv$games)) rv$idx <- rv$idx + 1
  })
}
```
# run app
```{r}
shinyApp(ui, server)
```
